content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' - adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will only touch core.py encode/_encode_* methods. Let me know if you're touching core.py too.

agent1: my return_positions diff is done and minimal - only touches encode()'s signature (added return_positions: bool = False param) and return statement (returns tokens or (tokens, positions)), plus one new small private helper method _token_positions() added after decode_with_offsets. No changes to allowed_special/disallowed_special logic. Should merge cleanly with your transformers param since we're editing different parts of the function body/signature. Go ahead with your change.
